---
title: "server_diag.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/server_diag.test.ts"
loc: 54
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.30
style_score: 4.55
intel_score: 8.81
overall_score: 5.49
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [startBridge](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/vis/server.js)
- [*](file://http)
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `PORT`
- `statsDir`
- `signetPath`
- `bridge`
- `token`
- `i`
- `url`
- `match`
- `fetchIndex`
- `data`
- `indexHtml`
- `fetchMatrix`
- `url`
- `statusNoAuth`
- `statusAuth`
